title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 20 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 20 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 20 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 20/06/2022
DCE iron ore was opened fell by more than 8%, and the intraday limit fell twice in a row.The main contract closed 746,decreased of 10.98%.Traders are not very enthusiastic about shipments, steel mills are mainly on the sidelines, and there are few transactions in the market.PBF at Shandong port dealt 820-830 yuan/mt,decreased 60-80 yuan/mt compare with last week; SSF at Shandong port dealt710-720 yuan/mt, decreased 55-60 yuan/mt compare with last week. PBF at Tangshan port dealt 820-830yuan/mt, decreased 55-60 yuan/mt than last week. Since last week, some steel mills have started to cut production on their own due to profit losses and poor sales of finished products.
